features: 【Premium Quality】3 cm tall, 3.8 cm diameter, the battery operated tea lights candles are ideal for romantic wedding, table decor, birthday, festival, home decorations etc.

【24 Long Lasting Battery Included】A package of 24 flickering votive led candles with battery included and installed, last for 120+ hours, ready to use and easy to turn on or off with a sliding switch.

【Not Waterproof】These flickering flameless LED tea lights candle are not waterproof. However, they are safe to use in an outside lantern or mason jar without worrying about flames. There are no fire hazards or burning risks, making them suitable for families with pets or children.

【Simulated Flickering Flame】 The plastic tealight votive candle made of high quality materials, premium flickering electronic IC and bright LEDs. It can be used as mood candles night lights with votive holders, glass cups or luminary bags.

【Devoted Customer Service】All the led flameless tealights battery operated candles are thoroughly and rigorously tested. If you are not completely satisfied with your purchase simply let us know and you’ll be offered a full refund or replacement.
description: Product Description CANDLE IDEA focuses on the development of LED flameless candles since 2015, using high-quality materials to produce products, ensuring to provide customers with premium products and services. IDEAL FOR VARIOUS DECORATIONS COOL AND ROMANTIC 1.5 inches wide in diameter by 1.2 inches tall, these LED tea lights can be fit into any standard votive holders or glass cups. The flickering light and the melted edge design make the battery tea light candles more realistic. Subtle flicker instead of annoying blinking. Ideal for wedding, propose, restaurant table, house, garden, party, festival decorations. BEST ALTERNATIVE TO REAL CANDLES 120+ Hours of long-lasting, wedding or party decor can be arranged in advance. Always elegant, don't need to deal with the mess of dripping wax. No fire hazards, safe for kids and pets. Windproof, ideal for outdoor garden, patio, porch lantern. PERFECT FOR HALLOWEEN These led candles can be used with pumpkins, bats to decorate the garden porch on Halloween. In addition, a few candles can be put into the carved pumpkin to make a lighted jack-o-lantern.
